SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner extends Object implements Serializable
Deterministic uncertainty and sensitivity runner for pipe fire-rupture studies.

The runner perturbs a small set of high-impact inputs and records the rupture-time spread. It is a lightweight screening tool for agentic handoffs; formal studies should replace the default perturbations with project-specific uncertainty distributions and acceptance criteria.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner

      public PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner(double timeStepSeconds, double maxTimeSeconds, boolean spreadsheetGasThermalMass)
      Creates an uncertainty runner.
      Parameters:
      timeStepSeconds - calculation time step in seconds
      maxTimeSeconds - maximum simulation time in seconds
      spreadsheetGasThermalMass - true to include spreadsheet gas thermal mass

    • run

      Returns:
      uncertainty summary

      private PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner.CaseResult runCase(String caseName, PipeFireRuptureInput input, PipeFireRuptureScenario scenario, PipeFireRuptureDataSource dataSource)
      Runs one perturbation case.
      Parameters:
      caseName - case name
      input - perturbed input
      scenario - perturbed scenario
      dataSource - base data source
      Returns:
      case result
